title: CSV + JSON-LD export tooling under the persistent-ID namespace
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Reconciled records must be exportable as CSV + JSON-LD under the project's persistent-ID namespace, carrying per-source license/attribution.
objective: Build CSV + JSON-LD export tooling that emits both formats under the w3id.org/PURL namespace and carries per-source license/attribution strings.
acceptanceCriteria: CSV + JSON-LD export tooling produces both formats from the reconciled records.
Exports are emitted under the project's persistent-ID (w3id.org/PURL) namespace.
Per-source license/attribution strings are carried into the exports; CC0/PD components labeled and any CC BY-SA text segregated.
output: tools/export/ CSV + JSON-LD export tooling, committed via PR.
